devInfo.pageSub: The studio that designed and built the DBC Germany platform — visible to super-admins only.

about.title: About Narikia UG
about.intro: {name} is a software company. We build software for organizations and independent entrepreneurs across industries — SaaS, web platforms, and mobile apps — and we also develop and operate our own products, including Bossmetics.
about.hrbValue: In registration — HRB to be published once issued
about.mission: Our focus is operational software — platforms teams depend on daily, engineered to the standard of flagship consumer products.

services.title: What Narikia builds
items: Custom SaaS products for clients across industries
Proprietary SaaS products we own and operate — Bossmetics and more
Web platforms and applications (Next.js, React, full-stack)
iOS, Android, and cross-platform mobile applications
Ticketing, registration, and event management platforms
Admin panels, operational dashboards, and internal tooling
Multilingual websites with full legal compliance
AI-driven automation, integrations, and decision-support systems
Custom CRMs and business operations software

contact.title: Contact & website
contact.note: For anything involving this platform — bugs, feature requests, or engagement — reach Narikia directly.

stack.title: Tech stack powering DBC Germany
stack.deploymentNote: Three apps deployed: admin.dbc-germany.com, tickets.dbc-germany.com, dbc-germany.com. Shared packages under packages/.

affiliation.badge: Part of Diambilay Business Center · Lubumbashi
affiliation.footer: DBC Germany is the European arm of Diambilay Business Center, founded in Lubumbashi by Dr Jean-Clément Diambilay.

hero.title: Building a new generation of African entrepreneurs — from Germany.
hero.subtitle: DBC Germany is the European chapter of Diambilay Business Center — an international incubator for the African diaspora in Europe.

services.title: The full stack of African entrepreneurship, in Germany.
services.subtitle: Six interconnected pillars designed to move founders from idea to investable business to global brand.

incubation.title: Incubation
incubation.short: 90-day programs that turn early-stage ideas into venture-ready businesses.
incubation.long: DBC's 90-day incubation curriculum — designed in Lubumbashi, delivered from Düsseldorf. In Germany: rolling applications, quarterly cohort intake, graduation into the DBC investment pipeline.

courses.title: Courses
courses.short: On-demand and cohort-based courses led by the continent's sharpest operators.
courses.long: The full DBC catalogue — from first business plan to CFO-grade finance — including Formation Excellentia and the Académie Investir en Afrique. Taught by practitioners who've done the work, in EN, DE and FR.

investments.title: Investments
investments.short: Pre-seed to Series A capital for African-founded businesses across EU and Africa.
investments.long: DBC's pre-seed to Series A capital for African-founded businesses across EU and Africa. In Germany: the DBC Germany fund, thesis-led co-investment with EU and AU partners, rolling LP applications.
bullets: Co-invest with top European and African funds

mentorship.title: Mentorship
mentorship.short: 1-on-1 sessions with senior leaders who built what you're building.
mentorship.long: DBC's senior-operator mentor network — former Fortune 500 execs, African unicorn founders, European venture partners. In Germany: quarterly DBC Germany founder meetups in Düsseldorf, monthly 1:1 matching, long-term relationships.

events.title: Richesses d'Afrique Germany
events.short: Flagship conferences and masterclasses that bring the ecosystem to one room.
events.long: DBC masterclasses and flagship conferences that bring the ecosystem together. In Germany: the Richesses d'Afrique Germany conference — 2026 edition at Congress Center West, Messe Essen, 13 June, 950+ founders, investors and executives.
bullets: DBC masterclasses rotate between African and European hubs

elearning.title: E-Learning
elearning.short: Richesses d'Afrique by DBC — the online academy for African entrepreneurship.
elearning.long: Richesses d'Afrique by DBC — the DBC online academy delivered on Podia. Masterclasses from the DBC faculty with the same quality as in-person, on your schedule. EN / DE / FR subtitles, new class monthly.

germanyBand.title: How to get in.
germanyBand.subtitle: Four ways to plug into DBC's catalogue from Europe — built and run from Düsseldorf.

meetups.title: Quarterly founder meetups
meetups.body: In-person gatherings in Düsseldorf for African-rooted founders building in Europe.

incubator.title: Incubator application
incubator.body: Apply to the next European cohort of DBC's 90-day incubation program.

fund.title: DBC Germany fund
fund.body: LP conversations and portfolio partnership for investors aligned with the DBC thesis.

tickets.title: Richesses d'Afrique Germany tickets
tickets.body: The flagship conference — 13 June 2026 at Congress Center West, Messe Essen.

events.title: Events that change careers.
events.subtitle: Live moments built for founders, investors and the diaspora shaping Africa's economy.
events.noUpcoming: Our next public event is being announced soon. Join the list below.

about.title: From Lubumbashi to Düsseldorf — one mission.
about.body: Founded in Lubumbashi by Dr. Jean-Clément Diambilay, Diambilay Business Center is an international incubator building a new generation of African entrepreneurs. DBC Germany is its European chapter, delivering the full DBC catalogue — incubation, capital, mentorship, courses, events — to African-rooted founders across Europe, in German, English and French.
about.conviction: The most powerful ideas deserve solid structures to grow into enduring companies.

contact.title: Let's build together.
contact.subtitle: Tell us who you are. We reply personally within two business days.
contact.success: Thanks — your message is in. We'll be in touch.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email info@dbc-germany.com.

footer.parentOrg: A subsidiary of Diambilay Business Center, Lubumbashi.

cta.readySub: Whether you're founding, funding or mentoring — there's a pillar for you.

about.title: About DBC Germany — founder, mission, locations
about.description: DBC Germany is an African-rooted business community serving the diaspora in Europe. Düsseldorf HQ, operator-led, backed by DBC across Africa and France.

services.title: Services — incubation, investment, courses, mentorship
services.description: DBC Germany runs incubation, investment prep, courses, mentorship, and events for African-rooted founders building between Europe and Africa.

servicesIncubation.title: Incubation at DBC Germany — 6-month founder programme
servicesIncubation.description: Apply to the DBC Germany incubation programme: six months of operator mentorship, capital prep, and community for African-rooted founders.

servicesCourses.title: Courses at DBC Germany — sharp skills for founders
servicesCourses.description: Courses from DBC Germany: finance, operations, fundraising, and go-to-market fundamentals for African-rooted entrepreneurs in Europe.

servicesInvestments.title: Investment prep — raise your next round with DBC Germany
servicesInvestments.description: Get your data room, story, and metrics investor-ready with DBC Germany. Operator-led coaching, European and African capital access.

servicesMentorship.title: Mentorship at DBC Germany — 1:1 operator guidance
servicesMentorship.description: Book regular sessions with senior operators from the DBC Germany network. Practical, no-fluff mentorship for founders in Europe and Africa.

servicesElearning.title: E-learning — Richesses d'Afrique Academy
servicesElearning.description: Self-paced business courses from the Richesses d'Afrique Academy by DBC Germany. Learn at your own pace, apply the same week.

servicesApply.title: Apply to DBC Germany incubation
servicesApply.description: Submit your application to DBC Germany's incubation programme. We review weekly and respond within 10 business days.

events.title: Events by DBC Germany — Richesses d'Afrique 2026, masterclasses
events.description: Upcoming DBC Germany events: Richesses d'Afrique Germany 2026 in Essen, masterclasses, and networking for African-rooted founders and investors.

news.title: News from DBC Germany — diaspora economy, founder stories
news.description: The DBC Germany journal: diaspora economy briefs, founder stories, policy notes, and programme updates for the African-rooted business community.

team.title: The DBC Germany team — leadership & operators
team.description: Meet the people behind DBC Germany. Senior operators in Düsseldorf running incubation, investment, courses, mentorship, and Richesses d'Afrique.

teamMemberFallback.title: DBC Germany — team profile
teamMemberFallback.description: Meet a member of the DBC Germany team — senior operator running programmes for African-rooted founders in Europe.

careers.title: Careers at DBC Germany — Düsseldorf operator roles
careers.description: Open roles at DBC Germany. Operator-grade work in Düsseldorf: incubation, investment, operations, content. Preference for African roots.

jobOfferFallback.title: Open role at DBC Germany
jobOfferFallback.description: Apply for an open operator role at DBC Germany. Düsseldorf-based, hands-on, purpose-driven work at the intersection of Europe and Africa.

faq.title: FAQ — DBC Germany, events, programmes
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about DBC Germany: tickets, refunds, programme eligibility, data handling, and the Handelsregister status.

contact.title: Contact DBC Germany — Düsseldorf office, press, support
contact.description: Reach DBC Germany: general enquiries, incubation applications, press, and partnerships. Düsseldorf office, phone, email, press desk.

partners.title: Partner with DBC Germany — sponsor Richesses d'Afrique 2026
partners.description: Sponsorship and partnership packages for Richesses d'Afrique Germany 2026 in Essen. Reach 950+ founders, investors, and executives.

press.title: Press & media — DBC Germany
press.description: Press resources for DBC Germany: key facts, logo and visual assets, executive bios, and press contact. 24-hour response on weekdays.

newsletter.title: DBC Germany newsletter — weekly brief
newsletter.description: Subscribe to the DBC Germany newsletter. One curated briefing per week on Richesses d'Afrique, programmes, and the African-rooted business community.

newsletterConfirm.title: Subscription confirmed — DBC Germany
newsletterConfirm.description: Your subscription to the DBC Germany newsletter is confirmed.

newsletterUnsubscribe.title: Unsubscribed — DBC Germany
newsletterUnsubscribe.description: You have been unsubscribed from the DBC Germany newsletter.
